
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<settings>
  <localRepository>/Users/example/.m2/repository</localRepository>
  <profiles>
    <profile>
      <repositories>
        <repository><url>https://repo1.maven.org/maven2</url></repository>
        <repository><url>http://repo.example.test/releases</url></repository>
      </repositories>
      <pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository><url>https://plugins.example.test/maven</url></pluginRepository>
      </pluginRepositories>
    </profile>
  </profiles>
</settings>
